overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk along a futuristic city sidewalk. The camera moves steadily forward past modern glass skyscrapers, a distinctive tiered pyramid building, and palm trees, eventually entering a covered walkway under an overpass. Bright midday sunlight illuminates the scene with vehicles passing on the adjacent road.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic city sidewalk with glass towers and pyramid building

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk approaching the tiered pyramid building and palm tree

entered.detail: tall glass skyscraper with construction cranes on top
distinctive white slanted building with tiered architecture
tall palm tree in center of view
green metal barrier separating sidewalk from road
elevated highway structure crossing over the road ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a bright sunny day in a futuristic downtown area. The camera walks forward along a concrete sidewalk bordered by a green metal railing, with a multi-lane road to the left. Modern glass skyscrapers rise on the left while a distinctive white tiered pyramid building dominates the center view. Sparse traffic moves along the road as the camera approaches a palm tree and the distant highway overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk passing yellow shipping container and classical building entrance

events.description: large yellow shipping container comes into view on the right side of sidewalk
lighting transitions to shadow as camera approaches building overhang

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past the palm tree and approaching the yellow container

entered.detail: bright yellow shipping container with markings parked on the sidewalk
building with tall white classical columns and graffiti

segments.scene_description: The camera continues walking forward as the palm tree passes behind. A bright yellow shipping container appears on the right sidewalk, blocking part of the path. The tiered pyramid building shifts to the left as the camera approaches a building with classical columns on the right. The highway overpass looms closer ahead, and the lighting begins to darken as the camera enters the building's shadow.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway under highway overpass with scaffolding

events.description: entering covered area under the highway overpass with reduced lighting
pedestrian with backpack appears walking ahead in the covered walkway

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass approaching a pedestrian ahead

notable_agents.action: walking ahead with a backpack under the overpass

entered.detail: orange metal scaffolding along the right side of the walkway
green neon sign reading HOTEL on the columned building

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the covered walkway beneath the highway overpass, where lighting drops significantly. The yellow container and pyramid building are now behind. The classical column building with graffiti and a green neon hotel sign dominates the right side, now much closer. Orange scaffolding appears on the right, and a pedestrian with a backpack walks ahead in the shadows as the camera continues forward through the underpass.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement through a sun-drenched futuristic downtown that gradually transitions into the dim shadows of an urban underpass. It begins on a bright concrete sidewalk bordered by a green metal railing, moving past modern glass skyscrapers and a dominant white tiered pyramid building. As the camera passes a palm tree, the scene shifts toward a yellow shipping container and a building with classical columns, with the lighting beginning to darken as the looming highway overpass casts a shadow over the path. The camera then enters the covered walkway beneath the overpass, where the bright daylight vanishes and is replaced by the glow of a green neon hotel sign and graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the view pushes further into the gloom past orange scaffolding and a lone pedestrian walking ahead through the shaded underpass.
